creator: ws@au.dyndns.ws
text:
When the "Ports & Packages/Individual Port" component is selected the "Component Description" text displays the instruction:

  Prefix "category/port:" to the issue title so that MAINTAINER is Assigned or CC'd automatically

Here "issue title" is referring to the "Summary" field. This can be confusing for new users as just evidenced on IRC (and which also reflects my own experience when first submitting a bug for ports).

The text "issue title" should be replaced by "Summary" or otherwise made clear that the issue title is entered in the "Summary" field - e.g.:

  Prefix "category/port:" to the issue title entered in the Summary field so that MAINTAINER is Assigned or CC'd automatically

or perhaps better:

  Prefix the Summary with "category/port:" so that MAINTAINER is Assigned or CC'd automatically
